CustomField.label: Value To Test (List Checks)
CustomField.description: Required for a Single query check using the "List includes any of" / "List excludes all of" operators: enter the formula that returns the scalar field value to test against the list from the Comparison Query (e.g. BillingCountry). Leave blank for every other Check Method.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: List checks only ("List includes any of" / "List excludes all of"). Return the single field value to test against the Comparison Query list, e.g. BillingCountry. Leave blank for record-formula and all other query checks.
